RoundId.description: The unique ID of the round

SeasonId.description: The unique ID of the season this round is associated with

Season.description: The soccer regular season for which these totals apply

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=AllStar).

Name.description: The display name of the round (examples: Regular Season, Semi-finals, Final, etc)

Type.description: The type of this round. Possible values: Cup; Table

StartDate.description: The start date of the round

EndDate.description: The end date of the round

CurrentWeek.description: The current week that this round is in

CurrentRound.description: Indicates whether or not this round is the current round of the competition/season

Games.description: The games and their details that are apart of this round

Standings.description: The standings details associated with this round of the competition

TeamSeasons.description: The team stat records associated with this round

PlayerSeasons.description: Player Season stat records associated with this round
